The following rules apply in Albion Online's ingame chat:
No hate speech or harassment: Avoid racist, bigoted, or very offensive language.
No cheating accusations or rule-breaking discussions: Avoid chat about cheating, botting, RMT, or gambling.
No spam or posting in the wrong channels: Avoid spam, excessive caps, wrong topic/language channel usage, and excessive self-promotion.
No inappropriate content: Do not post offensive material, personal attacks, or doxxing.
No toxic behavior: Avoid excessive negativity, trolling, or personal attacks against players, developers, or SBI.
Be respectful of moderators and their decisions: Do not harass moderators or discuss moderation decisions. Contact support@albiononline.com with any issues you have instead.
